description: Goal: make JIT/AOT closure invocation consume the new callable contract directly. Rewrite closure construction, closure entry harnesses, and direct/opaque closure-call lowering so argument ABI lanes and capture ABI lanes are handled separately, with the machine closure-body signature lowered uniformly as (args..., self, cont). Delete callable-entry selection from capture-type candidate sets and delete native codegen’s mixed capture-prefix ABI slicing. Acceptance: closure_typed_captures, curried_add, and multi_caller_spec_divergent pass on the relevant fz2 paths; telemetry reports boundary id plus direct-vs-opaque dispatch and exact target when known.
title: Rewrite compiler2 native codegen around callable boundaries and split arg/capture ABI
